column1: Jacob Wilson headlines today’s Beat The Streak slate with a steady bat at the top of Oakland’s order, enjoying a strong 73.3% hit probability and a prime platoon advantage at home. Right behind, Trea Turner brings his reliable profile and top-of-order role for Philly, also flashing a favorable matchup and a consistent approach that keeps his floor high. Yandy Diaz and Tyler Freeman both offer top-of-lineup security and the platoon edge, with Diaz’s contact skills always a threat on the road. Luis Arraez rounds out the list, as usual, with his trademark bat-to-ball ability and a favorable matchup to keep streaks alive.
